acp_jobs.name: mint_link
acp_jobs.title: Mint Affiliate Link
acp_jobs.description: Given a merchant name and a user EVM wallet address, searches the Laguna Network merchant catalogue, selects the best cashback rate, and mints a tracked affiliate shortlink. The shortlink registers the user's wallet for USDC cashback on any qualifying purchase. Supports 1000+ merchants across travel, retail, and lifestyle categories.

acp_jobs.name: sweep_commissions
acp_jobs.title: Sweep Commissions
acp_jobs.description: Checks the Laguna Network dashboard for a given user wallet and sweeps any available (confirmed) USDC commissions. Returns the pending balance, available balance, and total conversion count.
